title: cyphostemma cymosum subsp. orientale
intro: Cyphostemma cymosum subsp. orientale, also known as 'Oriental Bottle Plant' or 'Mother of Wine', is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyphostemma cymosum subsp. orientale include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from various types of pain. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
